user.title: SuperSmart EV Charging – General settings
user.description: Configure contract power, battery capacity and SOC targets. Targets can be changed later via number entities.

data.initial_user_soc_target: User SOC target – used for NIGHT F3 charging (%)
data.initial_vehicle_soc_target: Vehicle SOC target – used for PV SURPLUS & FORCE (%)

entities.title: SuperSmart EV Charging – Entity selection
entities.description: Link your Home Assistant sensors. Fields marked with * are required.

data.vehicle_connected_entity: * Vehicle connected entity – binary sensor or wallbox state sensor
data.grid_power_entity: * Grid power sensor, W – positive = import (e.g. sensor.rete_power)
data.total_power_entity: Total instant power – optional (e.g. sensor.potenza_istantanea). If omitted: computed as grid + PV.
data.wallbox_state_entity: * Wallbox state sensor – expected values: idle, waiting, pause, charging (e.g. sensor.silla_prism_stato_wallbox)
data.wallbox_voltage_entity: Wallbox voltage, V – optional, default 230V (e.g. sensor.wallbox_tensione)
data.button_authorize_entity: Authorize button entity – Silla Prism (e.g. button.silla_prism_autorizza_ricarica)
data.tariff_offpeak_value: Off-peak tariff value (e.g. F3, cheap, low)

mqtt.title: SuperSmart EV Charging – Wallbox MQTT configuration
mqtt.description: MQTT topics for wallbox control. For Silla Prism: set_mode = prism/1/command/set_mode, current = prism/1/command/set_current_limit. Authorize/revoke topics are only used if HA button entities are NOT configured.

data.mqtt_topic_authorize: Authorize charging topic (only if HA button NOT configured)
data.mqtt_topic_revoke: Revoke authorization topic (only if HA button NOT configured)
data.mqtt_topic_set_current: Set current limit topic (A) – e.g. prism/1/command/set_current_limit

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant

data.initial_vehicle_soc_target: Vehicle SOC target – PV Surplus & Force (%)
